use_cases: Displaying step-by-step tutorials with code snippets for developers
Guiding users through onboarding or setup processes in SaaS applications
Creating interactive code documentation with syntax highlighting
Building installation guides with copyable command snippets
Presenting multi-step forms or workflows with visual progress indication
ai_summary: A vertical step-by-step indicator component with integrated code display and clipboard copy functionality. Designed for tutorials, documentation, and onboarding flows with dark mode support. Features clickable copy-to-clipboard for code snippets and optional line highlighting for emphasis.
